mapper.select: /* 로그인용 사용자 조회 login.selectUser */ SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.EMAIL, U.PASSWORD, U.PHONE, U.ORG_ID, U.USE_YN, U.LAST_LOGIN_AT, U.PWD_CHANGED_AT, U.LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, U.TWO_FACTOR_YN, U.CREATED_AT, U.UPDATED_AT, U.CREATED_BY, U.UPDATED_BY, O.ORG_ID, O.ORG_NAME FROM ${dbId}.TB_USER U LEFT OUTER JOIN ${dbId}.TB_ORGANIZATION O ON U.ORG_ID = O.ORG_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}

/*사용자 권한 목록 조회login.selectAdminGubunList*/ SELECT DISTINCT IF(B.ETC1 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.ETC1) != '',B.ETC1,A.AUTH_GUBUN) AS AUTH_GUBUN FROM ${dbId}.COM_ADMIN A JOIN ${dbId}.V_COM_CODE B ON A.AUTH_GUBUN = B.CODE_ID AND B.CODE_GRP_ID = '018'
WHERE A.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT '99' FROM DUAL
/* 로그인 사용자 회사의 사용언어 목록 조회 login.selectLangList */ SELECT A.COMP_ID , A.LANG , B.LANG_NM FROM COM_COMP_LANG A LEFT JOIN COM_LANG B ON A.LANG = B.LANG WHERE A.COMP_ID = #{compId} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORDER

/* 인증시도 횟수 조회 login.selectAuthStatusCount */ SELECT IFNULL(FAIL_COUNT,0) AS CNT FROM COM_ACCESS_AUTH WHERE COMP_ID=#{compId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND IN_TYPE = 'password' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT ORDER BY CNT DESC LIMIT 1

/* 인증시도 횟수 조회 login.selectAuthStatusCount */ SELECT IFNULL(FAIL_COUNT,0) AS CNT FROM COM_ACCESS_AUTH WHERE COMP_ID=#{compId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND IN_TYPE = 'otp' UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS CNT ORDER BY CNT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: /* 인증시도 횟수 조회 login.insertAccessCertificationStatusData */ INSERT INTO COM_ACCESS_AUTH (COMP_ID, USER_ID, USER_NM, IN_TYPE, LAST_OCCUR_DATETIME, STATUS, FAIL_COUNT) VALUES(#{compId}, #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{inType}, NOW(), #{status}, #{failCount})

/* 인증시도 횟수 조회 login.insertAccessCertificationLogData */ INSERT INTO COM_ACCESS_CERTIFICATION_LOG (COMP_ID, USER_ID, USER_NM, IN_TYPE, OCCUR_DATETIME, CLIENT_IP, STATUS, OTP_STATUS, IP_STATUS, FAIL_COUNT) VALUES(#{compId}, #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{inType}, NOW(), #{clientIp}, #{status}, #{otpStatus}, #{ipStatus}, #{failCount})
mapper.select: /* OTP인증정보 조회 login.selectOTPAuth */ SELECT A.COMP_ID, A.USER_ID, IFNULL(B.OTP_USE_YN,'N') AS OTP_USE_YN, IFNULL(C.OTP_IMG, '') AS OTP_IMG, IFNULL(C.OTP_KEY, '') AS OTP_KEY, IFNULL(C.REQ_DT, '') AS REQ_DT FROM ${dbId}.V_ROLE_USER A LEFT OUTER JOIN COM_COMPINFO B ON A.COMP_ID=B.COMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COM_OTP_AUTH C ON A.COMP_ID=C.COMP_ID AND A.USER_ID=C.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: /* OTP인증정보 등록 login.insertOTPAuth */ INSERT INTO COM_OTP_AUTH (COMP_ID, USER_ID, OTP_IMG, OTP_KEY) VALUES (#{compId}, #{userId}, #{otpImg}, #{otpKey})

collection.column: {compId = COMP_ID, masterDbId = MASTER_DB_ID, templateDbId = TEMPLATE_DB_ID, lang = LANG, userId = USER_ID, menuGbn = MENU_GBN}

mapper.select: SELECT 1 AS DUMMY, #{compId} AS COMP_ID, #{masterDbId} AS MASTER_DB_ID, #{templateDbId} AS TEMPLATE_DB_ID, #{lang} AS LANG, #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{menuGbn} AS MENU_GBN

association.column: {compId = COMP_ID, dbId = DB_ID, userId = USER_ID, masterDbId = MASTER_DB_ID

mapper.select: /* 로그인용 조회 login.selectLoginProviderData */ SELECT 1 AS DUMMY, #{compId} AS COMP_ID, #{dbId} AS DB_ID, #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{masterDbId} AS MASTER_DB_ID
